description: You are a comparative law researcher cleaning up your Jurism library after completing a project on First Amendment jurisprudence. Move the following three references to the Jurism Trash: "Obergefell v. Hodges", "Gideon v. Wainwright", and "The Due Process Clause and the Substantive Law of Torts" by Ronald D. Poe. Ensure the other 7 references remain in the active library and do not empty the trash.

target_items: The Due Process Clause and the Substantive Law of Torts
